indications.text:
COMBIVIR in combination with other antiretroviral agents is indicated for the
treatment of HIV infection.
This label may not be the latest approved by FDA.
For current labeling information, please visit https://www.fda.gov/drugsatfda
NDA 20-857/S-014
Page 9
Description of Clinical Studies: COMBIVIR:...

COMBIVIR is indicated in combination with other antiretrovirals for the treatment of
HIV-1 infection.
Description of Clinical Studies: COMBIVIR: There have been no clinical trials conducted
with COMBIVIR. See CLINICAL PHARMACOLOGY for information about bioequivalence.
